metadata.title: KINEXIS Digital - Turn Traffic Into Revenue
metadata.description: We're a digital marketing agency that builds real sales systems, not fancy brochures. We specialize in SEO, paid ads, web design, and conversion funnels - all designed to get your phone ringing with qualified leads.
metadata.ogDescription: We build real sales systems for businesses that want predictable growth - not just pretty websites.

resourceLinks.toolkitDesc: 17 tools we use daily, grouped by channel.

footer.tagline: We turn inconsistent traffic into predictable revenue systems.
footer.missionTitle: We take on 8–10 clients at a time.
footer.missionBody: Focused engagements. Real results. No cookie-cutter playbooks.

hero.subtitle: We build the marketing infrastructure that turns qualified traffic into predictable revenue.|SEO, paid media, web design, and conversion systems that work together, not in silos.

landscaping.title: Landscaping Company
landscaping.headline: 5X Revenue Growth
landscaping.summary: A complete website rebuild and local SEO campaign turned this business around. Revenue went from $2,000/mo to $11,500/mo in 8 months.

dental.title: Dental Practice
dental.headline: 340% More Patients
dental.summary: Multi-location dental practice. Local SEO overhaul and ad restructure drove new patient bookings from 45 to 198 per month.

ecommerce.title: Premium E-Commerce Brand
ecommerce.headline: 4X Monthly Revenue
ecommerce.summary: Brand repositioning and site rebuild lifted AOV from $85 to $238 and revenue from $12K to $45K per month.

philosophy.label: Why Clients Switch To KINEXIS
philosophy.title: You've been here before.
philosophy.subtitle: Another agency. Another promise.|Another dashboard full of numbers that don't connect to revenue.
beforeItemDetails: Three-day email loops and vague updates. Urgent issues wait until your next scheduled call while ad spend keeps burning.
A PDF once a quarter, if you're lucky. No visibility into what's working, what's wasted, or what changed last week.
Black-box billing and unclear scope. You never know who's doing the work or where your budget actually goes.
They celebrate impressions and clicks while your pipeline stays flat. Activity looks busy. Revenue does not move.
Every quarter someone new owns your account. Context resets and you're re-explaining your business from scratch.
afterItemDetails: Every Monday: spend, leads, CPL, and pipeline in one digest. You always know where you stand and what's being optimized.
We agree on targets upfront: revenue, cost per lead, conversion rate. We report against them every week.
One senior strategist owns your account end-to-end. They know your business, market, and numbers. No handoffs.
We track what hits your P&L: qualified leads, close rate, ROAS, and LTV. Vanity metrics are context, never the headline.
Skip the ticket queue. When something matters, you're talking to decision-makers who can change direction fast.

cta.label: Let's Talk
cta.title: Ready to Build a
cta.subtitle: No rehearsed pitch. No pressure to sign anything.|Just a straightforward conversation about what real growth could look like for your business.

midCta.title: See what's possible|for your business

chatbot.initialMessage: Quick question: are you looking for SEO, paid ads, web design, or something else?
